6237533394268324719.question: A machine P can print one lakh books in 8 hours, machine Q can print the sam e number of books in 10 hours while machine R can print them in 12 hours. All the machines are started at 9.00 am , while machine P is closed at 11.00 am and the remaining two machines complete work. Approximately at what time will the work (to print one lakh books) be finished?
